# Am I Up

> Free AI-powered sports bet tracker. Paste any source (screenshots, X posts, bookmaker text, Telegram tips) and the AI extracts every bet into a structured row. Tracks closing-line value vs Pinnacle, equity curve, yield, ROC, win rate, max drawdown. Public shareable profile per user. Free, no credit card, data exportable as CSV anytime.

Am I Up is a free web app at amiup.io that helps sports bettors track their real edge instead of guessing. The wedge is the paste-and-parse feature: users paste unstructured text (screenshots of bet slips, X posts, group-chat tips, bookmaker copy-paste) and Claude Haiku extracts each bet into a structured record with kickoff date, event, selection, market, decimal odds, stake in units, and settled status. Bets are stored per-user in a Supabase Postgres database with row-level security and daily backups.

Every user gets a public profile at amiup.io/u/<handle> that shows lifetime P/L, equity curve, KPI grid (yield, ROC, CLV, win rate, max drawdown, median odds), sport / market / odds-range breakdowns, monthly bars, CLV distribution, and the last 30 settled bets. Users with multiple books (Personal, competition-specific like "Ylose Soccer" or "Ylose Tennis") can publish each book independently at amiup.io/u/<handle>/<book-slug>.

Built and maintained by Neil Macdonald, an independent sports betting analyst.

## Core

- [Landing](https://amiup.io/): What Am I Up does, live paste-and-parse demo, sample profile card.
- [Sample public profile](https://amiup.io/u/sample): Fully-featured example profile so visitors can see every metric before signing up.

## Learn (glossary)

- [What is Closing Line Value (CLV)?](https://amiup.io/learn/clv): Definition, formula, worked example. Why CLV is the truest available signal of edge in sports betting.
- [What is Yield in sports betting?](https://amiup.io/learn/yield): Definition, formula, benchmarks, yield vs ROI vs ROC, why yield is gameable in small samples.
- [What is Expected Value (EV)?](https://amiup.io/learn/expected-value): The single number underneath every profitable strategy, worked examples, EV vs CLV, positive-EV betting.
- [What is ROI in Sports Betting?](https://amiup.io/learn/roi): ROI defined without hand-waving, the stake-based vs bankroll-based ambiguity spelled out, worked example.
- [What is Return on Capital (ROC)?](https://amiup.io/learn/roc): The bankroll-based return metric, why serious bettors track it alongside yield, worked example.

## Compare

- [Am I Up vs bettin.gs](https://amiup.io/compare/bettin-gs): Feature-by-feature comparison for punters weighing the two trackers.
- [Am I Up vs Pikkit](https://amiup.io/compare/pikkit): Same for the US bookmaker-connected tracker.

## Optional

- [Full content for LLM ingestion](https://amiup.io/llms-full.txt): Markdown-formatted body content of the pages above so an LLM can quote or summarize without a second fetch.
